phrases.intent_en: Buy a family ticket for the museum
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un tarif famille, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn tah-REEF fah-MEE, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: The museum offers family tickets covering two adults and children. It is particularly popular with families and cinema enthusiasts for its extraordinary miniature worlds and film props.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photos are allowed inside
phrases.text_local: Peut-on prendre des photos à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TOHN PRAHN-druh day foh-TOH ah lehn-tay-RYUHR
phrases.cultural_note: Photography is generally allowed in the Musée Miniature et Cinéma, without flash.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long the museum visit takes
phrases.text_local: La visite dure combien de temps ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah vee-ZEET DOOR kohm-BYEHN duh TAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The museum typically takes one to two hours to visit depending on interest level.

responses.english: About an hour and a half.

phrases.intent_en: Ask whether photography is allowed inside
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que les photos sont autorisées à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh lay FOH-toh sohn oh-toh-ree-ZAY ah lan-tay-RYUR
phrases.cultural_note: Photography without flash is generally allowed throughout the museum. The miniature displays are extraordinarily photogenic — allow plenty of time to capture the detail.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the museum from Vieux Lyon
phrases.text_local: Comment se rendre au musée depuis Vieux Lyon ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN suh RAHN-druh oh moo-ZAY duh-PWEE vyuh lyohn
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is located on Rue Saint-Jean in the heart of Vieux Lyon, making it a natural stop on any walking tour of the Renaissance district.

responses.phonetic: ROO sant-ZHAHN, dahn luh vyuh LYOHN
responses.french: Rue Saint-Jean, dans le Vieux Lyon.
